hooks.command: python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); print('Run /test before committing.', file=sys.stderr) if 'src/lib/engines/' in p else None"

python -c "import json,sys,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); sys.exit(subprocess.call(['bash','scripts/check-no-secrets.sh'])) if cmd.startswith('git commit') else None"
